summary: A brief post sharing enthusiasm for Tetris-piece-shaped modular shelving being sold online. Shapiro expresses interest in making his own version as a DIY project, appreciating the clever design that lets buyers assemble the shelves in any configuration they want.
key_points: Tetris-shaped modular shelving offers customizable assembly in any configuration
Shapiro's maker instinct is to build his own version rather than buy it
money_quotes: I want to knock this off for my next project.
Assemble them however you want while trying not to get that crazy russian tetris music stuck in your head.
key_insight: A maker's first instinct upon seeing a clever product is to figure out how to build it themselves.
